# ========== Stage 1: 构建前端 ==========
FROM node:20-alpine AS frontend-builder

WORKDIR /home/web

COPY exam-web/package.json exam-web/package-lock.json ./
RUN npm ci

COPY exam-web/ ./
RUN npm run build

# ========== Stage 2: 构建后端（含前端静态资源） ==========
FROM maven:3.9-eclipse-temurin-17 AS backend-builder

WORKDIR /home/app

COPY exam-system/ /home/app/
# 将前端构建产物拷贝到 Spring Boot 静态资源目录
COPY --from=frontend-builder /home/web/dist/ /home/app/src/main/resources/static/

RUN mvn clean package -DskipTests

# ========== Stage 3: 运行 ==========
FROM eclipse-temurin:17-jre-focal

WORKDIR /app

COPY --from=backend-builder /home/app/target/exam-system-*.jar /app/app.jar

EXPOSE 18080
RUN mkdir -p /app/files /app/logs

CMD ["java", "-jar", "/app/app.jar"]

content.text:
好的，我看到了。你现在的部署方式是：**把前端 build 产物直接塞进 Spring Boot 的 `static/` 目录，由 Spring Boot 内嵌的 Tomcat 来同时 serve 前端静态资源和后端 API**。

你问的是这种方式和 **Nginx 单独部署前端 + 反向代理后端** 的性能差异。

---

## 性能对比

| 维度 | Spring Boot 内嵌 Tomcat serve 静态资源 | Nginx 前端 + 反向代理后端 |
|------|---------------------------------------|--------------------------|
| **静态资源吞吐** | 差。Tomcat 是 Java 应用服务器，每个请求经过 Servlet 线程池处理，QPS 约 **2k-5k**（取决于线程数） | 强。Nginx 事件驱动异步非阻塞，纯静态资源 QPS 轻松 **50k-100k+** |
| **并发连接数** | Tomcat 默认 200 线程，静态资源请求和 API 请求抢同一个线程池 | Nginx 单 worker 可处理数万并发连接，不影响后端 |
| **静态资源缓存** | Spring Boot 默认不加 Cache-Control/ETag，需要手动配置 | Nginx 天然支持 `expires`、`gzip`、`brotli`、`sendfile` 等，配置简单 |
| **gzip 压缩** | Tomcat 默认关闭，开启后消耗 JVM CPU | Nginx gzip/brotli 效率更高，还支持预压缩 `gzip_static` |
| **内存占用** | 静态资源走 JVM 内存，GC 压力增大 | Nginx 内存占用极小（几十 MB），不影响 JVM |
| **API 性能影响** | 静态资源请求占用线程池，高并发时 API 响应变慢 | 静态资源完全不经过后端，API 线程池专心处理业务 |
| **运维复杂度** | 简单，一个容器搞定 | 多一个 Nginx 容器/进程 |

## 结论

- **小项目 / 内部工具 / 用户量小**（<100 并发）：你现在这种方式完全够用，简单省事，性能差距用户感知不到。
- **正式生产环境 / 用户量大**：Nginx serve 静态资源的性能是 Tomcat 的 **10-20 倍**，而且最关键的是 **不会挤占后端 API 的线程池**。

## 要不要改？

说白了就两个方案：

| 方案 | 适用场景 | 改动量 |
|------|---------|--------|
| **A. 保持现状** | 内部系统、用户少、图省事 | 零 |
| **B. 加 Nginx** | 正式上线、用户多、追求稳定性 | Dockerfile 拆分 + 加个 nginx.conf |

你告诉我你的场景，我再决定要不要帮你改。

---

**改动总结：** 本次没有代码改动，仅分析了当前部署架构（Spring Boot 内嵌 Tomcat serve 前端静态资源）与 Nginx 部署的性能差异。核心结论：静态资源服务性能 Nginx 是 Tomcat 的 10-20 倍，且不会抢占 API 线程池。小项目无所谓，上量了建议加 Nginx。

file.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: exam-system-deploy
  namespace: exam-system
spec:
  replicas: 1
  revisionHistoryLimit: 3
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxUnavailable: 0
      maxSurge: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: exam-system
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: exam-system
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: exam-system
          image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-test:latest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 18080
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
                name: exam-system-configmap
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "512Mi"
              cpu: "250m"
            limits:
              memory: "1Gi"
              cpu: "1000m"
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 18080
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 18080
            initialDelaySeconds: 60
            periodSeconds: 30
            failureThreshold: 3
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: exam-system-data
              mountPath: /app/files
              subPath: files
            - name: exam-system-data
              mountPath: /app/logs
              subPath: logs
          lifecycle:
            preStop:
              exec:
                command: ["sh", "-c", "sleep 5"]
      volumes:
        - name: exam-system-data
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: exam-system-pvc
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: exam-system-svc
  namespace: exam-system
spec:
  type: NodePort
  ports:
    - port: 18080
      targetPort: 18080
      nodePort: 27287
      protocol: TCP
      name: http-port
  selector:
    app: exam-system

file.content:
exam-system:apply-env:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: apply-env
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    refs:
      - master
    changes:
      - exam-system/.env
  script:
    - kubectl apply -f ./exam-system/namespace.yaml
    - kubectl create configmap exam-system-configmap --from-env-file=./exam-system/.env --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f - -n exam-system
    - |
      for file in $(find ./exam-system -name "*.yaml" ! -name ".gitlab-ci.yml"); do
        if grep -q "kind: Deployment" "$file" && grep -q "exam-system-configmap" "$file"; then
          DEPLOYMENT_NAME=$(grep -A2 "kind: Deployment" "$file" | grep "name:" | head -n1 | awk '{print $2}')
          if [ ! -z "$DEPLOYMENT_NAME" ]; then
            echo "重启使用configmap的deployment: $DEPLOYMENT_NAME"
            kubectl rollout restart deployment $DEPLOYMENT_NAME -n exam-system || echo "deployment $DEPLOYMENT_NAME 尚未创建，跳过重启"
          fi
        fi
      done

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: exam-system-backend-deploy
  namespace: exam-system
spec:
  replicas: 1
  revisionHistoryLimit: 3
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxUnavailable: 0
      maxSurge: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: exam-system-backend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: exam-system-backend
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: exam-system-backend
          image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-backend-test:latest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 18080
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
                name: exam-system-configmap
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "512Mi"
              cpu: "250m"
            limits:
              memory: "1Gi"
              cpu: "1000m"
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 18080
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 18080
            initialDelaySeconds: 60
            periodSeconds: 30
            failureThreshold: 3
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: exam-system-data
              mountPath: /app/files
              subPath: files
            - name: exam-system-data
              mountPath: /app/logs
              subPath: logs
          lifecycle:
            preStop:
              exec:
                command: ["sh", "-c", "sleep 5"]
      volumes:
        - name: exam-system-data
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: exam-system-pvc
---
# 后端 Service —— ClusterIP 内部通信，不对外暴露
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: exam-system-backend
  namespace: exam-system
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 18080
      targetPort: 18080
      protocol: TCP
      name: http-port
  selector:
    app: exam-system-backend
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: exam-system-frontend-deploy
  namespace: exam-system
spec:
  replicas: 1
  revisionHistoryLimit: 3
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxUnavailable: 0
      maxSurge: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: exam-system-frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: exam-system-frontend
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: exam-system-frontend
          image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-frontend-test:latest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "64Mi"
              cpu: "50m"
            limits:
              memory: "128Mi"
              cpu: "200m"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /
              port: 80
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 3
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /
              port: 80
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 30
            failureThreshold: 3
            timeoutSeconds: 3
---
# 前端 Service —— NodePort 对外暴露，替代原来的 27287
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: exam-system-frontend-svc
  namespace: exam-system
spec:
  type: NodePort
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: 80
      nodePort: 27287
      protocol: TCP
      name: http-port
  selector:
    app: exam-system-frontend

搞定了爹。生成了以下文件：

## 新增文件清单

| 文件 | 作用 |
|------|------|
| `deploy/nginx.conf` | Nginx 配置：gzip 压缩、静态资源长缓存、`/api/` 反代后端、SPA fallback |
| `deploy/Dockerfile.frontend` | 前端镜像：node 构建 → nginx:alpine 运行 |
| `deploy/Dockerfile.backend` | 后端镜像：maven 构建 → JRE 运行（不再包含前端） |
| `kubernetes/exam-system/exam-system-deployment-nginx.yaml` | K8s 部署：前后端分离的 Deployment + Service |

## 架构变化

```
原来 (A方案):
  用户 → NodePort:27287 → Spring Boot (静态资源 + API)

现在 (B方案):
  用户 → NodePort:27287 → Nginx (静态资源 + 反代)
                                    ↓ /api/
                              ClusterIP → Spring Boot (纯API)
```

## 关键设计

- **NodePort 27287 不变**，对外访问地址不用改
- 后端 Service 改为 **ClusterIP**（`exam-system-backend`），只在集群内部可访问，Nginx 通过 K8s DNS 直接 `proxy_pass http://exam-system-backend:18080`
- Nginx 容器只需 **64-128MB 内存**，比原来整体资源消耗差不多，但 API 线程池不再被静态资源请求抢占
- 原来的 `deploy/Dockerfile` 和 `exam-system-deployment.yaml` **保留不动**，你可以随时切回 A 方案

## 切换到 B 方案的步骤

```bash
# 1. 构建两个镜像
docker build -f deploy/Dockerfile.frontend -t 192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-frontend-test:latest .
docker build -f deploy/Dockerfile.backend -t 192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-backend-test:latest .

# 2. 推送镜像
docker push 192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-frontend-test:latest
docker push 192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-backend-test:latest

# 3. 部署 K8s（用新的 yaml 替换原来的）
kubectl apply -f kubernetes/exam-system/exam-system-deployment-nginx.yaml
```

input.content:
# ========== 后端 Deployment ==========
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: exam-system-backend-deploy
  namespace: exam-system
spec:
  replicas: 1
  revisionHistoryLimit: 3
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxUnavailable: 0
      maxSurge: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: exam-system-backend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: exam-system-backend
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: exam-system-backend
          image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-backend-test:latest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 18080
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
                name: exam-system-configmap
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "512Mi"
              cpu: "250m"
            limits:
              memory: "1Gi"
              cpu: "1000m"
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 18080
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 18080
            initialDelaySeconds: 60
            periodSeconds: 30
            failureThreshold: 3
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: exam-system-data
              mountPath: /app/files
              subPath: files
            - name: exam-system-data
              mountPath: /app/logs
              subPath: logs
          lifecycle:
            preStop:
              exec:
                command: ["sh", "-c", "sleep 5"]
      volumes:
        - name: exam-system-data
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: exam-system-pvc
---
# 后端 Service —— ClusterIP 内部通信，Nginx 通过此 Service 反代
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: exam-system-backend
  namespace: exam-system
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 18080
      targetPort: 18080
      protocol: TCP
      name: http-port
  selector:
    app: exam-system-backend
---
# ========== 前端 Deployment ==========
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: exam-system-frontend-deploy
  namespace: exam-system
spec:
  replicas: 1
  revisionHistoryLimit: 3
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxUnavailable: 0
      maxSurge: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: exam-system-frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: exam-system-frontend
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: exam-system-frontend
          image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-frontend-test:latest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "64Mi"
              cpu: "50m"
            limits:
              memory: "128Mi"
              cpu: "200m"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /
              port: 80
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 3
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /
              port: 80
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 30
            failureThreshold: 3
            timeoutSeconds: 3
---
# 前端 Service —— NodePort 对外暴露，保持原端口 27287 不变
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: exam-system-svc
  namespace: exam-system
spec:
  type: NodePort
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: 80
      nodePort: 27287
      protocol: TCP
      name: http-port
  selector:
    app: exam-system-frontend

file.content:
stages:
  - check
  - docker
  - deploy

# ==================== 测试服 (testserver 分支) ====================

# 检查 K8s 连接
check-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: check
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    - testserver
  script:
    - kubectl config view

# 构建并推送镜像到内网仓库
docker-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: docker
  image: docker:19.03
  only:
    - testserver
  script:
    - docker build -f deploy/Dockerfile . -t 192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-test:latest
    - docker push 192.168.0.63:5000/px-exam-system-test:latest
    - echo "镜像构建及推送完成"

# K8s 部署（滚动更新）
deploy-testserver:
  tags:
    - "docker"
  stage: deploy
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
  only:
    refs:
      - testserver
  script:
    - kubectl rollout restart deployment exam-system-deploy -n exam-system

# ==================== 正式服 (master 分支) ====================

# 构建并推送镜像到 GCR
docker-master:
  tags:
    - docker
  stage: docker
  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/google/cloud-sdk:latest
  interruptible: true
  only:
    - master
  script:
    - gcloud auth activate-service-account --key-file ${GOOGLE_ONLINE_CONTAINER_REGISTRY}
    - gcloud auth configure-docker --quiet
    - docker build -f deploy/Dockerfile . -t us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker push us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    - docker tag us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system:latest
    - docker push us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-exam-system:latest
    - echo "px-exam-system:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} 推送成功"

# 部署留痕
deploy-master:
  tags:
    - xshell
  only:
    refs:
      - master
  stage: deploy
  variables:
    CACHE_DIR: "shell-runner-cache/exam-system-deployment"
    DIST_REPO: "https://oauth2:mTVn_6baAR8Koua-ZGcB@pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/px/exams/deployment.git"
  script:
    - export CACHE_DIR=${HOME}/${CACHE_DIR}
    - if ! [ -e $CACHE_DIR ]; then git clone -q $DIST_REPO $CACHE_DIR; fi
    - cd $CACHE_DIR
    - git fetch -q --prune --tags "origin"
    - git checkout -B master remotes/origin/master
    - cd $CACHE_DIR
    - git config user.email "$GITLAB_USER_EMAIL"
    - git config user.name "$GITLAB_USER_NAME"
    - 'git commit --allow-empty -m "exam-system: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE (SHA: $CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA)"'
    - git push -q "origin" master:master
    - echo "部署留痕提交完成"
  dependencies:
    - docker-master

content.text:
搞定了爹。全部改成 B 方案了，总结一下改了哪些文件：

## 改动汇总

| 文件 | 改动 |
|------|------|
| `deploy/Dockerfile` | 从 "前后端打包到一起" → **前端构建 + Nginx 运行** |
| `deploy/Dockerfile.backend` | **新增**，纯后端镜像（Maven 构建 + JRE 运行） |
| `deploy/nginx.conf` | **新增**，gzip 压缩 + 静态资源长缓存 + `/api/` 反代 + SPA fallback |
| `kubernetes/.../exam-system-deployment.yaml` | 从单容器 → **前后端两组 Deployment + Service** |
| `.gitlab-ci.yml` | 从构建 1 个镜像 → **前后端 2 个镜像并行构建**，deploy 阶段 restart 两个 deployment |

## 关键兼容点
- **NodePort 27287 不变**，外部访问地址不用改
- 前端 Service 名保持 `exam-system-svc`，K8s 里其他引用不受影响
- 后端 Service 名 `exam-system-backend`，nginx.conf 里 `proxy_pass` 直接用这个 K8s DNS
- CI 里前后端镜像 **并行构建**（同属 docker stage），不会增加 CI 时间
- 正式服 deploy-master 的 `dependencies` 已更新为依赖两个镜像构建 job
